Gateway = Gate (most likely specifically referencing the gate in the Black Pool)
The Unknowable = pretty accurate, just means "things which cannot be fathomed" pretty much
Among the Stars = accurate
The Fools = seems accurate? chinese is 愚痴者 where 愚痴 = folly/stupidity and 者 = people. The Fool (tarot card) is 愚者 so that's not it
Outlanders = accurate, 异乡人 or "those who come from a foreign land" (tempted to make a stranger in a strange land reference)
Out of the Aeons = accurate, if stylized. 超越万古, or "those who transcend eternity"
Hybrid = accurate
Dwellers of Darkness = accurate, 黑暗住民 or "citizens of the darkness"
given the consistency in these terms I think these are human translated terms
most of the narrative terminology/important terms are human-chosen
